home.title: The Big Five Personality Test
home.subtitle: Discover your personality profile based on the scientifically validated five-factor model.
home.dimensionsSubtitle: Five broad domains, each with its own facets — a readable summary of how you tend to think, feel, and act.

openness.title: Openness to Experience
openness.description: Describes a dimension of cognitive style that distinguishes imaginative, creative people from down-to-earth, conventional people.

conscientiousness.title: Conscientiousness
conscientiousness.description: Concerns the way in which we control, regulate, and direct our impulses.

extraversion.title: Extraversion
extraversion.description: Marked by pronounced engagement with the external world.

agreeableness.title: Agreeableness
agreeableness.description: Reflects individual differences in concern with cooperation and social harmony.

neuroticism.title: Neuroticism
neuroticism.description: Refers to the tendency to experience negative feelings.

result.saveResults: Save your result ID to revisit this page later.

compare.title: Compare Results
compare.subtitle: Enter result IDs to compare multiple Big Five profiles side by side.
compare.errorPrefix: Failed to load result for ID
